title: Recursive Fractal Generation
scenario: Generate a prompt that will produce a recursive Koch fractal curve using ASCII art. The fractal curve should consist of a total of 20 iterations, with each iteration adding 4 new segments to the curve. The prompt should be designed to produce a fractal curve with a maximum length of 100 characters. The fractal should be centered at the origin and extend to a maximum x-coordinate of 20.
constraints: Produce a recursive Koch fractal curve with a total of 20 iterations
Center the fractal at the origin

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated fractal adheres to the specified constraints.
Check if the fractal is visually presented correctly using ASCII art.
Check if the recursive algorithm produces the expected results.
